title: Quantum Gibbs Sampling and Thermal States
description: Explore quantum algorithms for preparing thermal (Gibbs) states, including variational approaches, quantum Metropolis algorithms, and applications to combinatorial optimization and quantum machine learning.
learningObjectives: Understand thermal/Gibbs states and their importance in physics and optimization
Implement quantum Metropolis-Hastings algorithms for thermal sampling
Compare variational and algorithmic approaches to Gibbs state preparation
Analyze the complexity of quantum thermal state preparation
Apply quantum Gibbs sampling to optimization and machine learning problems
